name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Bright red high quality ✨ truly high quality, classic bestseller 💓 Sac de Jour - front flap wallet, detachable metal chain, metal interlocking Y logo, jacquard embossed stitching decoration. Size 22.5*14*4CM, Model: 01740 🔺 100% Calfskin! Front snap closure! 16 card slots, 1 coin pocket, 2 bill compartments 💋💋
